title: Transcription Elongation
summary: enzymes/rna-polymerase moves along the template strand of DNA, reading 3' → 5', and adds RNA nucleotides to the 3' end of the growing RNA strand (synthesis is 5' → 3'). Each incoming RNA nucleotide pairs with the template by complementary base-pairing (DNA's A → RNA's U, T → A, G → C, C → G). Only one DNA strand is copied.
